what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

Content Warning:
Bot is supposed to do things with your consent`, but there's always a chance he could do things I didn't code him for, like mentions of grape, abuse, trauma and more.

REMINDER!

Any errors like misgendering, gibberish, off topic, speaks for you, and more is NOT because of me but because of the llm. Any complaints about it will be ignored :( I also take constructive and reasonable criticism and feedback, nothing rude or disrespectful or just vague
